The HÃ´tel Des Deux-Iles is a typical 17th century building located in the charming and historical Ile Saint-Louis, just a 10-minute walk from Notre Dame Cathedral and the Marais district.
The air-conditioned bedrooms are decorated with simplicity and elegance. Free Wi-Fi access, satellite TV and a minibar are provided in each en suite room.
A buffet breakfast is prepared every morning at this hotel, and it can be served to your room upon request.
The Louvre Museum is a 20-minute walk from the HÃ´tel Des Deux-Iles whilst the Luxembourg Garden is 1.7 km away. Pont Marie Metro Station is 400 metres from the hotel and provides direct access to the OpÃ©ra Garnier and Galeries LaFayette Department Store.

hotels.description_en:
HÃ´tel Dupond-Smith is located in the Marais area in central Paris. It offers individually decorated rooms with design features. Free Wi-Fi access is available throughout and the Louvre Museum is a 15-minute walk away.
Rooms have a flat-screen TV, air conditioning, a minibar and an iPod docking station. Each room includes a private bathroom with a bath or shower and a hairdryer.
You can relax with a drink from the bar and prepare hot drinks in your room with the provided electric kettle and coffee machine.
At HÃ´tel Dupond-Smith you will find a 24-hour front desk. Other facilities offered include a shared lounge, a ticket service and a tour desk.
Notre Dame Cathedral is a 10-minute walk from Hotel Dupond-Smith and the Pompidou Centre a is 2-minute walk away.

hotels.description_en:
Hotel de Crillon is set in Paris, 300 metres from both the Tuileries Garden and the Champs-ElysÃ©es and 1.5 km from the Louvre Museum. Some rooms have a balcony. The hotel features an indoor swimming pool and a spa.
Each room at Hotel de Crillon provides Rivolta Carmignani Italian linen and French Drouault pillows and duvets. The spacious marble bathrooms feature underfloor heating as well as bespoke toiletries and a bathroom mirror with an inset television. A walk-in rain shower and a bath are also provided. In-room check-in and a Bluetooth sound system are available.
In our gastronomic restaurant Lâ€™Ã‰crin*, we invite you to an exceptional culinary experience characterized by the subtlety of our dishes and remarkable pairings.
